scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1

commands.name: toggle-record
commands.title: Toggle Record
commands.description: Stop recording, or open content selection to start a new recording
commands.subtitle: BetterCapture

commands.name: open-recordings
commands.title: Open Recordings
commands.description: Open the BetterCapture recordings folder in Finder
commands.subtitle: ~/Movies/BetterCapture
